headline: FIS Launches New Cleared Derivatives Solution for Prediction Markets
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 24, 2026--Global financial technology leader FIS® today announced the launch of its new FIS CD Prediction Clearing solution to provide 24/7 post-trade clearing for regulated prediction markets.

headline: Kalshi Is Partnering With FIS to Reach ‘Next Wave’ of Prediction Market Growth
summary: Kalshi says a new partnership with Fidelity Information Services will help institutional traders trade on the firm’s prediction markets.

headline: British fintech Revolut reports record annual profit as it gears up for U.S. push
summary: The startup, which hit a $75 billion valuation in 2025, is one of Europe's most valuable private tech companies.
